description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the tmaier/docker-compose:18.02 Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets the DOCKER_DRIVER variable to overlay2. Define a single test stage and a test job that runs the commands: docker-compose build, docker-compose up -d, and docker-compose exec -T wordpress ./docker/setup-wordpress.sh. The test job runs in the test stage.
